mapper.sql: r.MSGR_ID, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.ROOM_TYPE_CD, 'group') = 'self' THEN '나와의 채팅' WHEN COALESCE(r.ROOM_TYPE_CD, 'group') = 'private' THEN COALESCE(partner.USER_NM, NULLIF(r.MSGR_NM, ''), '1:1 대화') ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(r.MSGR_NM, ''), member_names.MEMBER_NAMES, '그룹 채팅') END AS MSGR_NM, r.CRT_DT, r.DEL_YN, COALESCE(r.ROOM_TYPE_CD, 'group') AS ROOM_TYPE_CD, r.PINNED_MSG_CONT_ID, r.PINNED_BY, r.PINNED_DT, mu.ROLE_CD AS CURRENT_USER_ROLE, mu.NOTIFY_YN, owner_info.OWNER_USER_ID, pinned_msg.CONTENTS AS PINNED_MESSAGE_PREVIEW, partner.FILE_PATH AS PARTNER_FILE_PATH, partner.DEPT_NM AS PARTNER_DEPT_NM, partner.JBGD_NM AS PARTNER_JBGD_NM, last_msg.LAST_MSG_CONT, last_msg.SEND_DT AS LAST_MSG_DT, COALESCE(unread_info.UNREAD_COUNT, 0) AS UNREAD_COUNT, COALESCE(member_names.MEMBER_COUNT, 0) AS MEMBER_COUNT, COALESCE(member_names.MEMBER_COUNT, 0) AS PARTICIPANT_COUNT

INNER JOIN MESSENGER_USER mu ON r.MSGR_ID = mu.MSGR_ID AND mu.USER_ID = #{userId} AND mu.LEFT_DT IS NULL LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT u.USER_ID, u.USER_NM, d.DEPT_NM, j.JBGD_NM, fd.FILE_PATH FROM MESSENGER_USER mu2 JOIN USERS u ON mu2.USER_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON u.DEPT_ID = d.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN JOB_GRADE j ON u.JBGD_CD = j.JBGD_CD LEFT JOIN FILE_DETAIL fd ON u.USER_IMG_FILE_ID = fd.FILE_ID AND COALESCE(fd.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' WHERE mu2.MSGR_ID = r.MSGR_ID AND mu2.USER_ID <> #{userId} AND mu2.LEFT_DT IS NULL ORDER BY mu2.JOIN_DT LIMIT 1 ) partner ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT STRING_AGG(u.USER_NM, ', ' ORDER BY u.USER_NM) AS MEMBER_NAMES, COUNT(*) AS MEMBER_COUNT FROM MESSENGER_USER mu3 JOIN USERS u ON mu3.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE mu3.MSGR_ID = r.MSGR_ID AND mu3.LEFT_DT IS NULL ) member_names ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(c.MSG_TYPE_CD, 'text') = 'file' THEN '[파일] ' || COALESCE(c.CONTENTS, '첨부 파일') WHEN COALESCE(c.MSG_TYPE_CD, 'text') = 'system' THEN c.CONTENTS ELSE c.CONTENTS END AS LAST_MSG_CONT, c.SEND_DT FROM MESSENGER_CONTENT c WHERE c.MSGR_ID = r.MSGR_ID AND COALESCE(c.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY c.SEND_DT DESC LIMIT 1 ) last_msg ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS UNREAD_COUNT FROM MESSENGER_CONTENT c LEFT JOIN MESSENGER_READ mr ON mr.MSG_CONT_ID = c.MSG_CONT_ID AND mr.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE c.MSGR_ID = r.MSGR_ID AND c.USER_ID <> #{userId} AND COALESCE(c.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND mr.MSG_CONT_ID IS NULL ) unread_info ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT mu4.USER_ID AS OWNER_USER_ID FROM MESSENGER_USER mu4 WHERE mu4.MSGR_ID = r.MSGR_ID AND mu4.LEFT_DT IS NULL AND mu4.ROLE_CD = 'owner' ORDER BY mu4.JOIN_DT LIMIT 1 ) owner_info ON TRUE LEFT JOIN MESSENGER_CONTENT pinned_msg ON pinned_msg.MSG_CONT_ID = r.PINNED_MSG_CONT_ID AND COALESCE(pinned_msg.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE MESSENGER_ROOM SET PINNED_MSG_CONT_ID = #{msgContId}, PINNED_BY = #{userId}, PINNED_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE MSGR_ID = #{msgrId}
UPDATE MESSENGER_ROOM SET PINNED_MSG_CONT_ID = NULL, PINNED_BY = NULL, PINNED_DT = NULL WHERE MSGR_ID = #{msgrId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM MESSENGER_ROOM r
WHERE COALESCE(r.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY COALESCE(last_msg.SEND_DT, r.CRT_DT) DESC, r.CRT_DT DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT c.MSGR_ID FROM MESSENGER_CONTENT c INNER JOIN MESSENGER_USER mu ON mu.MSGR_ID = c.MSGR_ID AND mu.USER_ID = #{userId} AND mu.LEFT_DT IS NULL AND COALESCE(mu.NOTIFY_YN, 'Y') <> 'N' LEFT JOIN MESSENGER_READ mr ON mr.MSG_CONT_ID = c.MSG_CONT_ID AND mr.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE c.USER_ID <> #{userId} AND COALESCE(c.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND mr.MSG_CONT_ID IS NULL GROUP BY c.MSGR_ID ) unread_rooms

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MESSENGER_CONTENT c INNER JOIN MESSENGER_USER mu ON mu.MSGR_ID = c.MSGR_ID AND mu.USER_ID = #{userId} AND mu.LEFT_DT IS NULL AND COALESCE(mu.NOTIFY_YN, 'Y') <> 'N' LEFT JOIN MESSENGER_READ mr ON mr.MSG_CONT_ID = c.MSG_CONT_ID AND mr.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE c.USER_ID <> #{userId} AND COALESCE(c.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND mr.MSG_CONT_ID IS NULL

SELECT r.MSGR_ID, r.MSGR_NM, r.CRT_DT, r.DEL_YN, COALESCE(r.ROOM_TYPE_CD, 'group') AS ROOM_TYPE_CD FROM MESSENGER_ROOM r WHERE COALESCE(r.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(r.ROOM_TYPE_CD, 'group') = 'private' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MESSENGER_USER mu1 WHERE mu1.MSGR_ID = r.MSGR_ID AND mu1.USER_ID = #{userId1} AND mu1.LEFT_DT IS NULL ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MESSENGER_USER mu2 WHERE mu2.MSGR_ID = r.MSGR_ID AND mu2.USER_ID = #{userId2} AND mu2.LEFT_DT IS NULL ) AND 2 = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MESSENGER_USER mu3 WHERE mu3.MSGR_ID = r.MSGR_ID AND mu3.LEFT_DT IS NULL ) ORDER BY r.CRT_DT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.MSGR_ID, r.MSGR_NM, r.CRT_DT, r.DEL_YN, COALESCE(r.ROOM_TYPE_CD, 'group') AS ROOM_TYPE_CD FROM MESSENGER_ROOM r WHERE COALESCE(r.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(r.ROOM_TYPE_CD, 'group') = 'self' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MESSENGER_USER mu WHERE mu.MSGR_ID = r.MSGR_ID AND mu.USER_ID = #{userId} AND mu.LEFT_DT IS NULL ) ORDER BY r.CRT_DT DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'MSGR' || LPAD(nextval('MSGR_ID_SEQ')::text, 8, '0')
INSERT INTO MESSENGER_ROOM ( MSGR_ID, MSGR_NM, CRT_DT, DEL_YN, ROOM_TYPE_CD ) VALUES ( #{msgrId}, #{msgrNm}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'N', COALESCE(#{roomTypeCd}, 'group') )
mapper.select: SELECT MSGR_ID, MSGR_NM, CRT_DT, DEL_YN, COALESCE(ROOM_TYPE_CD, 'group') AS ROOM_TYPE_CD FROM MESSENGER_ROOM WHERE COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'
SELECT MSGR_ID, MSGR_NM, CRT_DT, DEL_YN, COALESCE(ROOM_TYPE_CD, 'group') AS ROOM_TYPE_CD, PINNED_MSG_CONT_ID, PINNED_BY, PINNED_DT FROM MESSENGER_ROOM WHERE MSGR_ID = #{msgrId}
